zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Evelyn於1502年出生在英國素瑞金斯頓 武朋 坦斯時，他的父親Roger Evelyn30歲，母親Alice Aylward24歲。他於1526年與Joan Mary Vincent在英國素瑞金斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1553年8月22日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國素瑞金斯頓 武朋 坦斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Evelyn于1502年出生在英国素瑞金斯頓 武朋 坦斯时，他的父亲Roger Evelyn30岁，母亲Alice Aylward24岁。他于1526年与Joan Mary Vincent在英国素瑞金斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1553年8月22日在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国素瑞金斯頓 武朋 坦斯。

nameMeanings.name: Evelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from an unrecorded Middle English female personal name Evelin(e), a double diminutive of Eve . Sometimes this surname was a variant of (or confused with) the surname Aveline, which is from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Avelin(e), either a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Ava, or of Old French and Middle English Avice (see Avis ).

variants.name: Eve
meanings: English (Essex) and Dutch: from the Middle English personal name Eve (from Latin Eva), of Biblical Hebrew origin (meaning ‘life’). According to the Book of Genesis, this was the name of the first woman, and in some cases the name may have been acquired by someone (invariably a man) who had played the part in a drama dealing with the Creation.

variants.name: Heavilin
meanings: Altered form of English Evelyn , with the addition of excrescent H-.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Evelyn was born in 1502, in Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England, his father, Roger Evelyn, was 30 and his mother, Alice Aylward, was 24. He married Joan Mary Vincent in 1526, in Kingston, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 22 August 1553, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Evelyn est né en 1502, à Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Roger Evelyn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Aylward, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Mary Vincent en 1526, à Kingston, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1553, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Evelyn 1502 in Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Evelyn 30 und seine Mutter Alice Aylward 24. Er hat 1526 in Kingston, Surrey, England Joan Mary Vincent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1553 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Evelyn è nato il nel 1502 nel Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Roger Evelyn, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice Aylward, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Mary Vincent nel 1526, nel Kingston, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1553, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Evelynが1502年にイギリススリーキングストン ウプオン サムスで生まれた時，父Roger Evelynは30歳，母Alice Aylwardは24歳であった。1526年にイギリススリーキングストンでJoan Mary Vincentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1553年8月22日に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリススリーキングストン ウプオン サムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Evelyn(이)가 1502년 영국 수리 킨그스턴 업 섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Evelyn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Aylward(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1526년 영국 수리 킨그스턴에서 Joan Mary Vincent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1553년 8월 22일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 킨그스턴 업 섬스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Evelyn nasceu em 1502, em Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Evelyn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Aylward, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Mary Vincent em 1526, em Kingston, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1553, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Evelyn родился в 1502 г. в местности кингстон упон тамесь, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Evelyn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Aylward, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Mary Vincent в 1526 г. в местности кингстон, сурри, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1553 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности кингстон упон тамесь, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Evelyn nació en 1502, en Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Evelyn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Aylward, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Mary Vincent en 1526, en Kingston, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1553, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, Inglaterra.
